markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and plan new vertical-specific campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Performance:** Clicks grew \~20% for the second week in a row, validating the current content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**New Strategic Focus:** Imubit will target three primary verticals in 2026: Refining (Oil & Gas), Chem/Petrochem, and LNG.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Action Item:** GrowthX to assess bandwidth for creating gated "playbooks" for each of the three target verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**Content Directive:** All new content must frame "closed-loop optimization" as a final stage, not the sole goal, to make adoption seem less daunting.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**Performance:** Clicks grew \~20% week-over-week for the second consecutive week.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [**New Content:** 7 articles will be published this week.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**Self-Modeling:** Focus on the specific bottleneck it solves—both data science (multivariate analysis) and data analysis (univariate analysis)—not the generic "how to build an AI model."](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [**Brownfield:** Target this niche term (\~30 monthly searches) to reach existing plants.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [**Closed-Loop Optimization:** Create more content on this high-performing topic, which drives strong CTRs and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [**Content Directives:**](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**"Coordinated Operating Strategies":** Avoid this specific phrase, as it is part of a future announcement. Use general terms like "coordinating teams" instead.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**"Full Automation isn't the goal":** Reframe as "Full automation isn't the *only* goal" to maintain the long-term vision of closed-loop optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)

### New Initiative: Vertical-Specific Playbooks

  - [**Objective:** Create gated content assets ("playbooks") to support demand-gen campaigns for Imubit's 2026 target verticals.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**Target Verticals:**](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [Refining (Oil & Gas)](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [Chem/Petrochem](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [LNG (Liquefied Natural Gas)](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Asset Concept:**](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [**Format:** A step-by-step guide or practical application, not a generic overview.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Content:** Adapt top-performing articles for each vertical into a cohesive guide.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Goal:** Attract warmer leads who are already interested in an implementation roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Must align with the new content directive (closed-loop as a final stage).](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will assess internal bandwidth for this new workflow and provide a timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Assess bandwidth for creating vertical-specific playbooks.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Propose a timeline for the playbook project to Imubit.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
      - [Reschedule next week's meeting for Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [**Imubit:**](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
      - [Provide the self-modeling webinar transcript to GrowthX after the Nov 25 event.](https://fathom.video/share/mjoVbmHvZTFYs1pTxHvhjbCB4hBxt7bJ?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
